message:
perf(time/wheel): fast-path empty wheel + purge storage on last cancel

Three related optimizations for when the timer wheel has no active timers:

1. advance_to() fast path: when active map is empty, skip the
   tick-by-tick loop entirely and jump current_tick directly to the
   target. Realign all level cursors to the new time via
   realign_cursors_to_current_tick(). This avoids O(delta_ticks) work
   for large time jumps on idle wheels.

2. purge_inactive_storage(): when the last timer is cancelled (via
   cancel() or collect_expired()), clear the ready queue, overflow
   list, all level slots, and occupied bitmaps. This releases memory
   held by stale slot entries and resets bitmaps so subsequent
   next_skip_tick() calls don't scan occupied slots from prior epochs.

3. Tests: empty_wheel_large_jump_realigns_all_cursors verifies a 1-hour
   jump on an empty wheel correctly positions all level cursors.
   cancel_last_timer_purges_stale_storage verifies that cancelling the
   last two timers leaves ready/overflow/slots/bitmaps fully cleared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
